claims.claim: Meta ads for Trachte Door Hallway campaign generating ~$0.30 cost per page view, indicating genuine audience interest despite creative quality issues
LinkedIn allows targeting by job title, industry, seniority, and company size for recruitment ads
LinkedIn Lead Gen Forms reduce drop-off from external redirects and pre-populate candidate data from LinkedIn profiles
LinkedIn API does not support personalized automation at scale for ABM outreach, making manual outreach the only viable path
Overhead Door Madison Meta ads delivering ~$0.40 CPC with high traffic volume as brand awareness play
Retargeting campaigns typically deliver stronger ROI than cold prospecting because audiences have already demonstrated intent
PaperTube was not running any retargeting campaigns despite having meaningful site traffic
BluePoint ATM LinkedIn static ad achieved $0.70 CPC and ~2% CTR, driving 8 form fills in one week
BluePoint ATM LinkedIn video boost achieved ~$10 CPC with lower CTR than static ad, serving brand awareness purpose
Cordwainer Meta lead form ads are generating unqualified leads (apartment seekers rather than memory care prospects) despite adding disqualifying filter questions
Meta Multi-Advertiser placements can crop ad creative and place ads alongside unrelated competitors, degrading brand impression
Meta enables Multi-Advertiser setting by default in some campaign configurations
BluePoint ATM LinkedIn ads running nationwide with 1.6% CTR across ~22,000 impressions and 376 clicks
LinkedIn B2B CTR averages typically run 0.4–0.6%
Didion Meta recruitment ads performing at $7–$24 per form submission at $2.30/day, with some ad sets flagged as learning limited
Scooter repair economics are unprofitable: most scooters retail for $500–600, repairs run $300–400, causing customers to discard rather than repair
Crazy Lenny's tunes-up promotions have performed well and should be recurring content type
Piano moving has low competition on Google Ads with only one known competitor having a dedicated landing page
LinkedIn offers the most granular B2B targeting of any major ad platform, enabling simultaneous filtering by location, job title, industry, and company size
Reddit ads are significantly cheaper than comparable placements on Google or Meta, especially for niche audiences
CTR above 6% is considered exceptional; Citrus America's Commercial Juicer campaign achieved 12.65% CTR, nearly double the agency benchmark across 40+ clients
Remarketing display campaigns can achieve interaction rates above 0.5% average with very low CPCs ($0.41 average)
LinkedIn approval for ad campaigns typically takes a few days after submission
Meta's Advantage+ budget feature allows the platform to naturally favor whichever creative performs better between static graphics and video
Reddit users are sensitive to overt promotion; ad creative must feel native and helpful, not salesy
Influencer effectiveness has declined as audiences have grown skeptical of paid endorsements; authenticity and fit matter more than follower count
Pinterest is a high-intent discovery platform for wedding planning with strong visual fit for product categories
Geofencing campaigns around trade shows can capture attendees during high-intent purchasing decision windows
LinkedIn enables simultaneous filtering by job title, industry, and location — capabilities Google Ads cannot match for B2B targeting
Meta CPCs for local service businesses run $0.30–$0.40 versus $4–$5 on Google Search — a 10x cost difference
Cordwainer Meta Ads achieved CPLPV under $2.00 and CTR of 4–5%, meeting target benchmarks
BluePoint LinkedIn campaigns generated only 3 form fills over ~$3,000 spend (two months), with average CPC of $1.85
Paper Tube Co LinkedIn ads achieved 0.38% CTR after two weeks, described as within normal range for LinkedIn video ads
Overhead Door's Bing PPC baseline was 29 conversions over 30 days at ~$24/conversion
Avant Gardening Meta campaigns experienced recurring payment failures due to bank-side fraud flags on the billing card
ClickCease saved ~$115/month in fraudulent clicks on Google Ads but requires separate manual configuration for Microsoft Ads protection
TrackRite Meta ad account is blocked pending business verification because TrackRite is a trading name division of Trachte Building Systems, not a standalone legal entity
Capitol Bank's Meta account suspension was unexplained and resolved without communication from Meta, leaving the client reluctant to make changes
Meta's Business Manager permission system frequently fails to propagate access when a new ad account is added; fix requires removing and re-adding the partner with Facebook Page explicitly included
Cordwainer's actual buyer for memory care is adult children (~45 years old), not the person who will live there
Didion's existing Meta campaigns achieved CPC under $1, described as 'incredible'
AHS school training course has 50-person capacity but only 15 registrations; email list performance is strong (30–40% open rates, ~50% form conversion) but list size is the bottleneck
Meta outperforms Google Ads for recruitment advertising, with Meta TOFU delivering ~$11 CPA vs. Google's significantly higher CPA
LinkedIn is the highest-performing paid acquisition channel for BluePoint ATM to date
Local Service Ads (LSAs) are a lower-risk testing mechanism for legal services before scaling standard PPC
Rotating weekly social boosts prevent ad fatigue better than single extended boosts
Visual products (packaging, apparel, design) sell better on Meta and YouTube than Google Search alone
LinkedIn's company-level and contact-list targeting enables precise B2B account-based marketing unavailable on Meta or Google
Meta lead-gen campaigns with 0-for-11 conversion rate indicate fundamental audience/intent mismatch and should be paused rather than reduced in budget
Geofencing at trade shows can capture attendees without booth costs by targeting city-wide and venue-specific audiences on Meta
Prior cook-specific social boost for Skaalen achieved ~5,500 impressions, ~115 site clicks, and ~$0.30 CPC
LinkedIn video ads outperform carousel and single-image ads in engagement
LinkedIn automation tools carry meaningful account restriction risk; platform actively enforces against third-party automation
Meta clicks cost ~$0.30 vs. $4–5 on Google Search for local service businesses
Overhead Door Madison Meta Ads campaign maintains CPC under $0.40 across all ad formats (testimonials, carousels, video, homeowner creatives)
LinkedIn matched audience targeting requires minimum audience size threshold; ~1,000 raw contacts often fall below minimum after matching
Google Discovery campaigns attract consumer traffic rather than B2B buyers; $169 wasted on irrelevant consumer queries in 90 days for Aviary
Shopify is a poor host for lead-gen landing pages requiring CRM form integrations; WordPress + Gravity Forms is the standard solution
New blog posts receiving diverse early traffic (social, email, direct) signal quality to Google and accelerate ranking faster than organic-only approach
LinkedIn is more effective than Google Search for reaching B2B financial services decision-makers by job title and company
Didion successfully filled high-level roles including CEO using LinkedIn recruitment ads
YouTube retargeting creative optimized for mobile dimensions appears distorted when rendered on YouTube; platform-specific creative variants required
LinkedIn static ads can achieve $0.70 CPC against industry benchmark of $2–$5
claims.context: BluePoint NY compliance campaign with strong call-to-action

claims.claim: LinkedIn outperforms Google Ads for B2B niche compliance topics
claims.context: BluePoint campaign showed LinkedIn significantly outperformed Google in volume and lead quality

claims.claim: YouTube is currently the highest-value paid channel with favorable pricing relative to other platforms
claims.context: Asymmetric assessment; pricing advantage may close within 12–18 months as competition increases

claims.claim: Paid search requires sufficient keyword search volume to be effective
claims.context: American Extractions campaign failure attributed to low keyword search volume in niche market

claims.claim: Poor domain rating raises Google Ads CPCs and lowers ad placement quality
claims.context: American Extractions case study; weak domain undermines both organic and paid performance

claims.claim: Email campaigns outperform paid ads for niche B2B clients with low search volume
claims.context: American Extractions generated majority of leads through email, only ~3 through paid ads

claims.claim: LinkedIn personal profile optimization should prioritize first 3–4 lines of About section
claims.context: Only first 3–4 lines visible without clicking 'See more'

claims.claim: LinkedIn headline should lead with job title, then add value proposition
claims.context: Title gets cut off in most views; value proposition speaks to what you do for others

claims.claim: Meta Ads budgets are set at Ad Set level, not campaign level
claims.context: Three-tier hierarchy: Campaign → Ad Set (budget here) → Ad

claims.claim: Meta billing emails use rolling two-day windows and commonly overlap, causing confusion
claims.context: Billing & Payments tab in Ads Manager provides clearer transaction breakdown

claims.claim: Consistency beats perfection on LinkedIn; weekly good posts outperform polished posts every 3 weeks
claims.context: Core principle from Asymmetric's LinkedIn strategy

claims.claim: Personal/event posts with photos consistently outperform text-only or graphic-only posts on LinkedIn
claims.context: Authenticity drives engagement more than polish

claims.claim: Tagging colleagues in LinkedIn posts significantly expands reach
claims.context: More tags = further reach without additional effort

claims.claim: Comments generate more algorithmic reach than likes on LinkedIn
claims.context: Engagement tactic guidance

claims.claim: Meta awareness campaigns can reach senior living research audiences at significantly lower CPC than Google Search
claims.context: Adava Care, 2025-11-19

claims.claim: Retargeting audiences segmented by engagement level can convert 10–20% of previously interested visitors
claims.context: Adava Care, 2026-04-05; segments: visited location page, viewed pricing, abandoned form

claims.claim: Redirecting paid social budget from generic awareness to content promotion can improve ROI when paired with organic search
claims.context: Adava Care, 2026-04-05

claims.claim: Paid social audiences should be segmented by decision-maker role and intent level
claims.context: AHS, 2026-04-05; budget allocation should reflect conversion likelihood, not audience size

claims.claim: Geofencing campaigns at industry events can target high-intent attendees in defined physical locations
Timely social content addressing immediate local events maximizes relevance and engagement
claims.context: AHS, 2026-04-05; weather, infrastructure issues

claims.claim: Seasonal audio advertising during predictable demand windows builds awareness cost-efficiently
claims.context: AHS, 2026-04-05; example: spring thaw for moisture-related home issues

claims.claim: Meta's audience targeting can reach niche professional groups without exact job title matching
claims.context: AHS, 2026-04-05; example: school employees

claims.claim: Reddit and LinkedIn ads serve distinct funnel roles: Reddit for low-cost awareness, LinkedIn for higher-intent MOFU
claims.context: American Extractions, 2025-10-27

claims.claim: Consolidating fragmented ad budgets into single broad campaigns targeting universal pain points improves lead velocity
claims.context: Asymmetric, 2026-04-05; when per-segment budgets are too small

claims.claim: Multi-advertiser placements on Meta drive lower-intent traffic and should be disabled
claims.context: Adava Care, 2025-10-22

claims.claim: Spotify ads can reach prospective self-storage investors through business/finance podcast targeting
claims.context: Trachte strategy; listeners already in investment mindset

claims.claim: LinkedIn Sales Navigator complements paid ad efforts for targeted prospecting
claims.context: BluePoint ATM; Mike Stebbins assigned dedicated seat

claims.claim: Dual-bid strategy separating low-intent and high-intent searches optimizes spend efficiency
claims.context: BluePoint Q1 campaign; traditional ATM searches ~$1/click, reverse ATM searches ~$10/click

claims.claim: LinkedIn does not support interest-based targeting like Meta, but job title + industry combination is sufficient for B2B
claims.context: BluePoint Q1 campaign planning

claims.claim: Google Ads B2B in-market audiences are less effective than geographic and intent-based targeting for B2B
claims.context: Google treats users as consumers, not by job title/industry

claims.claim: Personal storytelling on LinkedIn performs well when posted from individual profiles rather than company pages
claims.context: Citrus America founder story campaign; increases authenticity and organic draw

claims.claim: Meta's delivery algorithm favors ads with longer performance history, crowding out newer creatives
claims.context: Didion recruitment campaign; older 'Set B' dominated delivery despite newer creatives available

claims.claim: Ad fatigue from single creative running 6+ months contributes to significant application drop-off
claims.context: Didion recruitment; ~35% drop in job applications correlated with stale creative rotation

claims.claim: Under-spending against budget cap signals campaigns may not be competitive enough in auction
claims.context: Didion spending ~$545 against $700 max budget

claims.claim: Test small before scaling: start at $100, increment to $200, then $500 before major spend
claims.context: Mark Hope's paid media philosophy; avoid front-loading budget before validation

claims.claim: LinkedIn is expensive relative to performance but viable when properly targeted at decision-makers
claims.context: Aviary strategy; best for reaching VPs, CEOs, COOs not actively searching

patterns.pattern: Trade show Meta campaigns require booth numbers and dedicated landing pages before launch; these are frequently blocking items
Meta lead form ads attract low-intent, unqualified audiences even when disqualifying questions are added to forms
Clients pause paid social campaigns at natural calendar boundaries (month/quarter end) to evaluate performance before committing to new budget
LinkedIn ads perform better when aligned to monthly campaign verticals with job title and industry targeting filters applied
Meta account access issues are resolved by removing and re-adding partners with explicit Facebook Page inclusion in the invitation
Design team capacity constraints frequently block paid social campaign launches, requiring workload rebalancing
Organic social content quality (authentic, frequent, community-focused) provides strong foundation for paid social creative
Retargeting is frequently missing from ad account audits despite being a high-ROI optimization opportunity
LinkedIn static ads outperform video ads for direct response objectives, while video serves brand awareness purpose
Paid social campaigns are deferred in favor of SEO focus when organic growth is the primary 2026 investment

Multi-channel paid social testing approach: clients run simultaneous small tests across multiple platforms (Google, Meta, LinkedIn, Reddit, Pinterest, Spotify) rather than betting heavily on a single channel
LinkedIn is preferred for B2B campaigns targeting professional decision-makers; Google Ads is preferred for intent-capture; Meta handles awareness and broader audience reach
Reallocation of budget from underperforming to high-performing campaigns without increasing total spend is a standard optimization approach

Competitor-imitation content strategy: when a client's social content underperforms, studying high-performing competitor posts and adapting their format/tone is faster than iterating on failing original creative
Geofencing and location-specific creative are used for event promotion (trade shows, seminars) to drive registrations and local awareness
Influencer partnerships for consumer/lifestyle brands use promo codes as the partnership mechanism rather than cash fees, especially for mid-tier influencers
Retargeting campaigns are prioritized as the first paid channel to activate for new products/launches due to lower cost and higher intent
Reddit subreddit-targeted ads are positioned as cost-effective, high-intent channels for niche B2B audiences and investment-oriented products
Meta (Facebook/Instagram) is used for brand awareness, visual storytelling, and recruitment; Instagram is preferred over Facebook for visual-heavy industries
LinkedIn Sales Navigator is required for ABM (account-based marketing) programs to enable targeted outreach and HubSpot integration
LinkedIn is selected for B2B campaigns targeting professional decision-makers by job title and industry; Meta is selected for local service awareness and recruitment
Meta campaigns for local service businesses consistently underperform initial expectations or require creative refresh after 6+ months of running the same assets
Retargeting is consistently identified as the highest-ROI tactic but is frequently missed in initial campaign setups
Campaigns require 5,000–10,000 impressions before meaningful optimization decisions should be made; changes made too early risk introducing noise
Meta account access issues are recurring and require removing/re-adding the partner relationship with Facebook Page explicitly included in the invitation
Client-initiated unauthorized changes to ad accounts (pausing campaigns, creating duplicates) undermine agency optimization and require explicit expectation-setting
LinkedIn native lead gen forms are recommended over website landing pages for B2B audiences to reduce friction and leverage pre-populated profile data
CPM (brand awareness) optimization is used for top-of-funnel campaigns; CPC optimization is introduced for middle/bottom-funnel conversion campaigns
Meta verification issues arise when the ad account name does not match legal entity names (e.g., trading names, divisions); resolution requires human support escalation
Social media content strategy for service businesses emphasizes repurposing existing assets (blog articles, case studies) over net-new content creation to maintain sustainable cadence
Recruitment campaigns on Meta benefit from brand-appropriate imagery (residential vs. clinical) and immediate boosting to accelerate applicant response
Meta account suspensions are opaque, lack clear violation explanations, and have no reliable customer support path — leaving clients reluctant to make changes post-reinstatement
Geo-targeted Meta boosts ($50–$100) are effective for local events/training when search volume is too low for PPC and audience is geographically concentrated
Meta performs better than Google for audience-based targeting (recruitment, lead-gen) while Google Search captures high-intent keywords; optimal strategy uses both channels
LinkedIn requires higher CPM/CPC but justifies cost for B2B/enterprise targeting due to precision and account value; pilot budgets of $1,000/month are common starting point
Rotating/weekly social boosts are preferred over single extended boosts to prevent ad fatigue and reach different audience segments
Trade show campaigns benefit from multi-layer targeting: city-wide prospecting + geofenced venue-specific + post-show nurturing via ads to collected contacts
Remarketing audiences require time to populate before campaigns can launch; minimum audience size thresholds (typically 100 for Display, 1,000 for Search) must be met
Landing page destination decisions significantly impact conversion: direct-to-form links reduce friction for time-sensitive conversions; career/browse pages work for exploratory audiences
Meta budget allocation typically weights residential/consumer segments higher than commercial/B2B on social platforms due to platform demographics
Form submission volume without quality conversions (0-for-11 pattern) indicates audience mismatch; phone verification alone insufficient to filter low-quality leads in senior care vertical
Conversion tracking setup (LinkedIn, Meta, Google) must be verified before campaign launch or relaunch; incomplete tracking limits performance analysis
Payment method blockers prevent campaign launch; client responsibility to add card to ad account before Asymmetric can activate campaigns
Multi-format paid social campaigns (testimonials, carousels, video, static) perform at parity when audience targeting and offer are strong; format diversity hedges against creative fatigue
LinkedIn is platform of choice for B2B recruitment and professional hiring; Meta is better for frontline/hourly worker recruitment
Consolidating small budgets into single broad campaigns outperforms segmented campaigns; thin budgets across multiple segments produce insufficient signal
LinkedIn and email ABM sequences work in parallel: LinkedIn drives top-of-funnel awareness; email handles segmented, industry-specific nurturing
Low-budget Meta awareness campaigns ($2–5/day) generate meaningful impressions and traffic for local service businesses at fraction of Google Search cost
Creative fatigue is addressed through copy rotation, photo asset refresh, and video introduction rather than budget reallocation
Paid social campaigns targeting niche audiences (subreddits, specific job titles) offer lower CPMs and higher contextual relevance than broad platforms
LinkedIn content requires differentiated strategy from Facebook/Instagram; professional audience and tone differ significantly
Competitor emulation (studying competitor content style, tone, format) drives more engagement than cartoon/AI-generated imagery for B2B social
Multi-touch campaign coordination (LinkedIn ads + direct mail) increases effectiveness; same audience reached across channels
B2B niche/compliance topics perform better on LinkedIn than Google Search
patterns.evidence: BluePoint NY compliance: LinkedIn $0.70 CPC vs. Google $2–$5 benchmark; LinkedIn outperformed Google in volume and lead quality

patterns.pattern: Low search volume in niche markets makes paid search ineffective; email becomes primary channel
patterns.evidence: Only ~3 leads from paid ads; majority from email campaigns

patterns.pattern: LinkedIn content strategy emphasizes consistency over perfection, with weekly posting as minimum viable presence
patterns.evidence: Weekly good posts outperform polished posts every 3 weeks; best days Tue–Thu, ~9 AM

patterns.pattern: Personal/authentic content (photos, event posts, team wins) outperforms generic or overly polished content on LinkedIn
patterns.evidence: Personal event posts consistently outperform text-only; founder story from personal profile increases authenticity

patterns.pattern: Creative fatigue from single ad running 6+ months causes measurable performance decline
patterns.evidence: ~35% drop in job applications; same headline 'Will you help us push us forward?' over-saturating feed

patterns.pattern: Meta's algorithm favors older ad sets with longer performance history, limiting new creative delivery
patterns.evidence: Set B dominated delivery despite newer creatives available; required manual intervention to rebalance

patterns.pattern: Segmented retargeting by engagement level (location page, pricing, form abandonment) achieves 10–20% conversion
patterns.evidence: Retargeting audiences segmented by engagement level convert 10–20% of previously interested visitors

patterns.pattern: Dual-bid strategy separating intent levels optimizes spend efficiency across search campaigns
patterns.evidence: Traditional ATM searches bid ~$1/click (low intent), reverse ATM searches bid ~$10/click (high intent)

patterns.pattern: Multi-channel campaigns (LinkedIn + Google + Email + Direct Mail) outperform single-channel approaches for B2B
patterns.evidence: BluePoint runs coordinated campaigns across LinkedIn, Google, email, direct mail, and organic social

patterns.pattern: Hashtag strategy should anchor on 2–3 core tags used on every post, supplemented by topic-specific tags
patterns.evidence: #MomsAcrossAmerica and #TestedClean on every post; supplementary tags by topic

patterns.pattern: Politically charged hashtags should be avoided to prevent audience alienation
patterns.evidence: #Maha avoided due to political associations; decision to revisit if climate shifts

patterns.pattern: LinkedIn profile optimization prioritizes first 3–4 visible lines for About section and headline
patterns.evidence: Only first 3–4 lines visible without 'See more'; headline cut off in most views

patterns.pattern: Meta Ads budget confusion stems from three-tier hierarchy (Campaign → Ad Set → Ad) and draft/publish workflow
patterns.evidence: Avant Gardening overspend ($46/day vs. $30/day target) caused by unpublished budget changes

patterns.pattern: Paid media strategy should start with small budgets ($100) and increment only after validation
patterns.evidence: Mark Hope's philosophy: avoid front-loading budget; test $100 → $200 → $500 before scaling

patterns.pattern: Industry-specific campaign templates enable repeatable monthly cadence for B2B outreach
patterns.evidence: Stadiums & Arenas campaign serves as template for monthly industry campaigns (Water Parks, Live Music Venues, etc.)

patterns.pattern: Retargeting infrastructure should fire on landing page visits to enable follow-up ads across platforms
patterns.evidence: Both X-Pro and founder story ads drive to citrusamerica.com to fire retargeting pixel

patterns.pattern: Soft CTAs (e.g., 'Read more') on brand awareness ads enable retargeting without product pitch
patterns.evidence: Founder story ad uses soft CTA; retargeted ads lead to homepage, not product page

patterns.pattern: Collaborative social media management works when roles are clearly defined and visual baselines provided
patterns.evidence: Internal ownership with external creative support; clear role definition enables effectiveness

patterns.pattern: Geo-targeted paid social campaigns for events should pair booth CTAs with credibility signals
patterns.evidence: Trade show campaigns strengthen value proposition with leadership announcements, awards

patterns.pattern: Podcast targeting on Spotify reaches investment-minded audiences; messaging should emphasize ROI and passive income
patterns.evidence: Business & Finance podcast listeners already in investment mindset; messaging frames self-storage as proven opportunity

contradictions.claim_a: BluePoint ATM LinkedIn ads are performing well and should be continued
contradictions.claim_b: BluePoint ATM LinkedIn campaigns were paused in December 2025 pending performance review
contradictions.resolution: Not a true contradiction — the optimization article discusses planned improvements to LinkedIn ads (aligning to monthly verticals, adding job title/industry filters), while the pause article reflects a later decision to pause pending Oct-Nov performance review before 2026 budget allocation. The pause was a strategic decision to conserve budget and evaluate ROI, not a reflection of poor performance.

contradictions.claim_a: Campaigns report being 'limited by budget' while not spending the allocated budget
contradictions.claim_b: Actual daily spend averaged $40/day against a combined daily budget of $60/day, meaning the budget ceiling was not being hit
contradictions.note: This is not a contradiction between sources but rather a paradox within the same campaign that warrants investigation — Google Ads may be reporting budget limitations while actual spend remains below ceiling

contradictions.claim_a: LinkedIn ads were flagged as a stronger near-term play for Quarra Stone's ABM strategy
contradictions.claim_b: Meta ads remain an option to revisit in the future for Quarra Stone
contradictions.note: Not a direct contradiction but reflects deprioritization of Meta ads relative to LinkedIn for B2B ABM, which aligns with the broader pattern

contradictions.claim_a: LinkedIn ads for BluePoint ATM generated only 3 form fills over $3,000 spend and were paused in favor of Google Ads PMAX
contradictions.claim_b: LinkedIn is selected as the primary B2B targeting vehicle for BluePoint ATM due to its granular audience controls and is the recommended approach for reaching facility managers and decision-makers
contradictions.context: Strategy document recommends LinkedIn; performance data shows it underperformed and was paused. The contradiction reflects a gap between strategic intent and execution/performance.

contradictions.claim_a: Cordwainer's Meta Ads campaigns are performing consistently and meeting target benchmarks (CPLPV < $2.00, CTR 4–5%)
contradictions.claim_b: Cordwainer's account control problem involved the client owner pausing the properly configured campaign and creating a duplicate campaign with her own settings, fragmenting the ad strategy
contradictions.context: Performance metrics are positive, but the account control issue suggests the campaign structure was compromised. The performance data may reflect the original configuration before the client's unauthorized changes.

contradictions.claim_a: Meta lead-gen campaigns should be paused if conversion rate is 0-for-11, as reduced budget will still attract same low-quality audience
contradictions.claim_b: Budget reallocation from Google Display to Meta TOFU is recommended to increase conversions at same total spend
contradictions.note: Not a direct contradiction but tension: Cordwainer paused Meta due to poor quality, while Didion is increasing Meta investment. Context differs (memory care lead-gen vs. recruitment TOFU), suggesting vertical/audience type matters significantly.

contradictions.claim_a: General targeting on LinkedIn static ads broadens reach and unblocks launch faster than account-based targeting
contradictions.claim_b: Account-based targeting on LinkedIn ensures specific companies in prospect list are reached, whereas general targeting does not guarantee it
contradictions.note: Same source acknowledges trade-off explicitly; not a contradiction but a documented decision with acknowledged risk.

contradictions.claim_a: LinkedIn automation tools carry meaningful account restriction risk and should be avoided
contradictions.claim_b: Aaron Grossman is consulting his sales network to learn what peers are using (implying some peers are successfully using automation tools)
contradictions.note: Not a direct contradiction, but tension: the research acknowledges risk while also noting that peers are using tools, suggesting some practitioners accept the risk

contradictions.claim_a: LinkedIn is expensive relative to performance
contradictions.claim_b: LinkedIn static ads achieved $0.70 CPC against $2–$5 industry benchmark
contradictions.resolution: Not necessarily contradictory; Aviary context is general B2B, while BluePoint achieved exceptional performance on compliance topic. LinkedIn cost-effectiveness varies by targeting precision and campaign type.

contradictions.claim_a: YouTube is currently the highest-value paid channel with favorable pricing
contradictions.claim_b: LinkedIn significantly outperformed Google in volume and lead quality for B2B compliance
contradictions.resolution: Not contradictory; YouTube and LinkedIn serve different funnel stages. YouTube for awareness, LinkedIn for B2B decision-maker targeting. Context-dependent.

exceptions.general_rule: Meta lead form ads are effective for lead generation
exceptions.exception: Cordwainer's Meta lead form ads generate predominantly unqualified leads (apartment seekers) despite adding disqualifying filter questions
exceptions.context: Memory care / high-consideration services where creative may visually resemble general apartment listings

exceptions.general_rule: Retargeting should be a baseline component of paid media strategy
exceptions.exception: Overhead Door Madison is running primarily brand awareness campaigns without aggressive lead-gen retargeting, due to healthy service capacity (appointments only 1–2 days out)
exceptions.context: Service businesses with capacity constraints

exceptions.general_rule: LinkedIn is appropriate for recruitment ads targeting salaried/professional roles
exceptions.exception: Didion explicitly excludes skilled trades and manufacturing roles from LinkedIn, directing them to Meta/Google instead
exceptions.context: Recruitment for hourly/technical roles

exceptions.general_rule: Organic social content should align with brand identity and product scope
exceptions.exception: Crazy Lenny's explicitly excludes scooters from social content despite having experimented with scooter service, due to unprofitable repair economics
exceptions.context: Product/service profitability drives content scope decisions, not just brand identity

exceptions.general_rule: LinkedIn is preferred for B2B campaigns targeting professional decision-makers
exceptions.exception: Quarra Stone's Facebook page launch was approved despite LinkedIn being the stronger channel, to ensure presence across major platforms for future optionality
exceptions.context: B2B stone/construction company

exceptions.general_rule: Retargeting campaigns are prioritized as the first paid channel to activate
exceptions.exception: Wedding App strategy includes simultaneous testing across Google Ads (retargeting), Pinterest, Spotify, and Reddit rather than sequential activation
exceptions.context: Consumer software product launch

exceptions.general_rule: Geofencing is used for trade shows and seminars to drive event registrations
exceptions.exception: Trachte's trade show campaigns use geo-targeting around venue areas but timing details were incomplete at planning stage
exceptions.context: B2B manufacturing/trade show marketing

exceptions.general_rule: Influencer partnerships require payment or promo codes
exceptions.exception: Doudlah Farms' influencer trial sends 15 gift boxes with no payment obligation or expectation of return, evaluating organic coverage before committing to paid partnerships
exceptions.context: Consumer food/agriculture brand

exceptions.general_rule: Meta CPCs for local service businesses run $0.30–$0.40
exceptions.exception: Avant Gardening Meta campaigns had elevated cost per result; target was ~$1.00 per result, suggesting higher CPCs than the baseline
exceptions.context: Service business (landscaping/gardening)

exceptions.general_rule: LinkedIn is the primary B2B targeting vehicle for professional decision-makers
exceptions.exception: BluePoint ATM paused LinkedIn ads and reallocated budget to Google Ads PMAX due to low direct conversions and high CPC ($1.85)
exceptions.context: B2B ATM sales; audience is facility managers and operations directors

exceptions.general_rule: Retargeting is consistently the highest-ROI tactic
exceptions.exception: AHS school training campaign targets two distinct audiences (school administrators and parents) with different messaging; retargeting strategy not mentioned as a primary lever
exceptions.context: Compliance training for schools; audience is not actively searching

exceptions.general_rule: Meta campaigns should be optimized for CPM (brand awareness) before shifting to CPC (conversion)
exceptions.exception: Didion's Meta recruitment campaign is structured as a standalone campaign with a $1,000/month budget and conversion goal (recruitment), not brand awareness
exceptions.context: Time-sensitive recruitment need; separate campaign for clean testing

exceptions.general_rule: LinkedIn's algorithm needs time (2+ weeks) before making major structural changes
exceptions.exception: Paper Tube Co swapped out a prior ad set after a day or two due to poor performance; the new ad set with updated video creative performed meaningfully better
exceptions.context: Early-stage campaign with suboptimal creative; rapid iteration justified

exceptions.general_rule: Social media boosts should run for extended periods to maximize reach
exceptions.exception: Skaalen job fair boost used rotating weekly boosts (2 weeks total) instead of single extended boost to prevent ad fatigue
exceptions.context: Time-sensitive event (April 22) with limited runway; rotating strategy prioritized audience freshness over duration

exceptions.general_rule: LinkedIn campaigns require account-based targeting to ensure prospect list coverage
exceptions.exception: BluePoint NY campaign switched to general targeting to unblock launch and broaden reach beyond ZoomInfo list
exceptions.context: Cashless ban compliance campaign with time pressure; team accepted risk of not reaching specific ZoomInfo companies in exchange for faster launch

exceptions.general_rule: Meta performs well for recruitment advertising across all candidate types
exceptions.exception: Didion's Meta TOFU works well for hourly/production roles but may not reach salaried candidates due to 30–50 mile geographic radius around Cambria, WI
exceptions.context: Salaried positions require broader geographic reach; Meta's tight radius may be insufficient for professional roles

exceptions.general_rule: Organic social posts should be boosted with paid spend to maximize reach
exceptions.exception: Crazy Lenny's E-Bikes declined to boost six approved organic posts; client has significant existing billboard investment and chose not to add paid social spend
exceptions.context: Client budget allocation preference; organic posting only with email campaign coordination

exceptions.general_rule: Remarketing campaigns should launch once audiences are created
exceptions.exception: Cordwainer remarketing audiences created but not yet populated; campaigns cannot launch until minimum audience size threshold is reached
exceptions.context: Newly created audiences require time to accumulate visitor data; launch blocked until Google's minimum threshold (typically 100–1,000) is met

exceptions.general_rule: Lead-gen form submissions indicate campaign viability
exceptions.exception: Cordwainer Meta lead-gen produced 11 form submissions with zero quality leads; phone verification did not filter out invalid/unqualified contacts
exceptions.context: Senior care vertical; audience/intent mismatch despite form validation; campaign paused rather than optimized

exceptions.general_rule: Video ads outperform static and carousel formats in paid social
exceptions.exception: Overhead Door Madison shows all formats (testimonials, carousels, video, homeowner creatives) performing at parity with CPC under $0.40
exceptions.context: Home services vertical; strong audience targeting and offer

exceptions.general_rule: Segmented campaigns allow for industry-specific targeting and personalization
exceptions.exception: Asymmetric found that consolidating $1,500/month into single broad campaign targeting universal pain point (stagnating revenue) outperforms three-way segmentation
exceptions.context: Small budget ($1,500/mo) across multiple segments; early pipeline-building phase

exceptions.general_rule: LinkedIn matched audiences require contact list uploads for precise targeting
exceptions.exception: BluePoint's ~1,000-contact ZoomInfo list fell below LinkedIn's minimum matched audience threshold; attribute-based targeting (job title, industry, company size) required instead
exceptions.context: Small contact list; niche vertical (stadiums/arenas)

exceptions.general_rule: Paid search is primary channel for lead generation
exceptions.exception: Niche B2B markets with low search volume; email becomes primary channel
exceptions.context: American Extractions; low keyword search volume in niche market

exceptions.general_rule: Google Ads outperforms LinkedIn for B2B targeting
exceptions.exception: B2B niche/compliance topics where LinkedIn's job title + industry targeting is more precise than Google's consumer-based approach
exceptions.context: BluePoint NY compliance campaign

exceptions.general_rule: Meta's algorithm favors older ad sets with longer performance history
exceptions.exception: Manual intervention can rebalance delivery to newer creatives
exceptions.context: Didion recruitment campaign; requires deliberate action to reduce Set B delivery weight

exceptions.general_rule: LinkedIn video ads typically outperform static ads
exceptions.exception: Video boost for BluePoint compliance had higher CPC (~$10) and lower CTR than static ad ($0.70 CPC, ~2% CTR)
exceptions.context: BluePoint NY compliance campaign; video served brand awareness purpose but not recommended for repeat runs

exceptions.general_rule: Broader audience targeting increases reach
exceptions.exception: Granular LinkedIn targeting (job title + industry) reduces audience size but increases relevance and conversion likelihood
exceptions.context: BluePoint Q1 campaign; team agreed to avoid going too narrow initially to preserve learning signal

exceptions.general_rule: Hashtags with high follower counts drive more reach
exceptions.exception: #TestedClean is low-competition tag but builds brand association over time and differentiates from competitors
exceptions.context: Doudlah Farms hashtag strategy; low follower count initially but high strategic value
